name: tizenyoutube
description: Samsung Tizen TV YouTube starter app

scripts.validate-config-version: python3 -c "import json,re,xml.etree.ElementTree as ET; pj=json.load(open('package.json', encoding='utf-8')); root=ET.parse('config.xml').getroot(); version=root.attrib.get('version',''); assert re.match(r'^\d+\.\d+\.\d+$', version), 'invalid config.xml version: ' + version; assert pj.get('version') == version, 'package.json version ' + str(pj.get('version')) + ' != config.xml version ' + version; print('version OK', version)"
